summary: Ship acquisition channels — npm optionalDependencies binary wrapper, Homebrew, cargo install — auto-detected, fail-loud on a missing platform binary

gate.reason: needs human release setup (npm org + @temper scope, Homebrew tap, signing/publish creds) before the mechanical wrappers can be validated end-to-end

new.description: Build the per-target release binaries and publish them to the npm platform packages (channel 2: the engine binary pinned by the SDK via per-platform `optionalDependencies`, plus standalone release assets), GitHub release assets, and the Homebrew tap; channel auto-detected. Distinct from any CI check job (which under the re-cut is a documented user-authored job, not a generated file).

edit.description: The root `package.json` today is the *private* flume control-plane manifest (`temper-flume-harness`, `private: true`). The npm distribution entry needs platform-specific `optionalDependencies` pointing at per-target prebuilt-binary packages plus a launcher that resolves and execs the platform binary, erroring loudly if none is installed (fail-loud, 50-distribution). Reconcile with the flume manifest (a non-private publish entry, or a split package dir) rather than clobbering it. Scoped `@temper` names per the resolved (project-name) fork. NB distinct from sdk/package.json (the SDK authoring-face manifest for `temper` + `@temper/claude-code`).

acceptance: A stranger acquires the prebuilt binary via npm (platform-specific optionalDependencies), Homebrew, standalone release assets, or `cargo install`; a missing platform binary is an install error, never a silent skip.
notes: Release infra, mostly outside `src/`; cargo gates can't validate npm/Homebrew publish, and channels need human creds. Re-cut 2026-07-04: acquisition intent now lives in 50-distribution 'Three channels' (npm `temper` + `@temper/claude-code`; the binary pinned via per-platform optionalDependencies + standalone; the plugin/bundle). Root `package.json` is the private flume manifest (not sdk/package.json) — reconcile or split. Parked on human release creds.
